name: coinmarketcap
description: CoinMarketCap data for Gemini CLI — crypto prices, market caps, exchange data, trending coins, and more via the official CoinMarketCap MCP server.

settings.name: CoinMarketCap API Key
settings.description: Your CoinMarketCap API key (X-CMC-MCP-API-KEY). If not set, OAuth authentication will be used instead.
